name: Adya Inc.
summary: Adya Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides telecommunication services to residential and business customers worldwide. The company offers casual calling services; prepaid long distance calling cards; long distance services; voice-over-Internet-protocol services under the Home Phone brand; hosted private branch exchange business services that provide customers with business telephone services; and wholesale and re-sale wireless services. It also provides cellular phone communication services, SIM cards, roaming devices, and Wi-Fi roaming solutions directly, as well as through distributors. The company was formerly known as Telehop Communications Inc. and changed its name to Adya Inc. in February 2017. Adya Inc. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Markham, Canada.
